title: Which governance role fits you?
description: Answer a few questions to find out how you can best participate in Cardano governance.

outcomes.title: Delegate your voting power
outcomes.description: Delegation is the easiest way to participate. A DRep votes on proposals on your behalf while your ada stays safely in your wallet. It takes just a few minutes to set up and you can change your DRep at any time.

outcomes.title: Become a DRep
outcomes.description: You have the time and motivation to actively shape Cardano. As a DRep you review governance proposals, vote on behalf of your delegators, and help steer the network's future. A refundable deposit of 500 ada is required.

outcomes.title: Start by learning more
outcomes.description: Governance is new to you and that's perfectly fine. Take your time to understand how it works, read the constitution, and explore governance actions before choosing your role.

questions.question: How much time can you dedicate to Cardano governance?

options.text: A few minutes to set it up, then I'm done
I can check in occasionally
I want to stay informed and vote regularly
I'm ready to make it a regular commitment

questions.question: Do you want to vote on every governance proposal yourself?

options.text: No, I'd rather have someone knowledgeable vote on my behalf
Not yet, I want to understand the process first
Yes, I want to review and vote on proposals myself
Yes, and I want to represent others too

questions.question: How familiar are you with Cardano's governance processes?

options.text: I'm completely new to this
I understand the basics
I'm comfortable with most governance concepts
I have deep knowledge and can explain them to others

questions.question: Would you be comfortable making decisions that affect the entire Cardano network?

options.text: I'd rather leave that to people who know more
Maybe in the future, once I learn more
Yes, I'm ready to take on that responsibility
Yes, and I want to advocate for specific policy directions

questions.question: What motivates you most about Cardano governance?

options.text: Making sure my ada has a voice without extra effort
Understanding how decentralized decision-making works
Actively shaping the future direction of Cardano
Representing my community and building trust
